notes: Four fixes (2026-06). (1) iPad: opening the シーンレイヤー panel no longer makes the joystick untouchable — the old rule hid the joystick while the panel was expanded; now the panel stops at bottom:208px and the joystick + ▲▼ sit in the freed strip below it, both usable, panel content (incl. figure bone sliders) clear above. (2) iPad: tapping the 画質 chip no longer enlarges the other top buttons — the chip is a <div> and was missed by the button-only touch-action:manipulation rule, so iOS double-tap-zoomed off it; now #qi-badge + the toolbar divs/containers are covered. (3)(4) Offline save: URL-streamed RAD scenes (?demo=1 / ?autoload=URL) used to LOSE their 3DGS data on save (no in-memory bytes → marked missing). They now persist the source streamUrl and re-stream it on restore (Option A — reconstructable while online; not a fully-offline archive since a 357MB stream can't be safely embedded on mobile). Local-file scenes still embed their bytes as before (phones skip only when >200MB to avoid a tab crash). Builds on v0.0.15.
